questions.enonce: What is the simplest way to save energy at home?
options: Turning off lights when leaving a room
Keeping the windows open in winter
Leaving the TV on all night

questions.enonce: LED bulbs use more energy than old incandescent bulbs.
Material used to keep heat inside a house is called {{1}}.

questions.question: Match the action with the energy-saving result.

pairs.right: Uses less energy for heating water

questions.enonce: What does it mean to be 'energy-efficient'?
options: Using the least amount of energy possible to get the job done
Using energy only during the day
Spending a lot of money on electricity
